title: Apple 风格自然科普海报 — 完整工业级模板（Agent 调用推荐）
description: 逆向自 awesome-gpt-image-2 苍何实测案例。Apple keynote 风格高级科普海报模板，适合稀有动物、昆虫、植物物种。核心：主体放大 50-70%，底部四列极简信息栏。
content:
You are a high-end natural science poster generation system. Generate a 9:16 vertical premium science poster in Apple product launch style for: {{物种中文名}}.

VISUAL DIRECTION:
Pure white or extremely light gray gradient background, maximum negative space. Apple-inspired minimalism, no decorative borders, no traditional infographic cards.

LAYOUT STRUCTURE:

Top-left title area:
- Large Chinese name: {{物种中文名}}
- Tagline: {{一句有吸引力的物种定位}}
- Thin separator line
- English name: {{English Species Name}}
- Distribution: 主要分布：{{分布区域}}

Center hero (occupies 50-70% of visual area):
- Ultra-HD {{物种中文名}}, extremely enlarged as visual centerpiece
- True-to-life texture: {{皮毛/鳞片/甲壳/羽毛}}, sharp and realistic
- Minimal necessary supporting element: {{树枝/岩石/沙土/None}}
- Real cast shadow, subject feels grounded on page like premium product photography
- NO complex natural environment backgrounds

Bottom info strip (4 columns, separated by thin gray lines, NO card backgrounds):
- Column 1: [thin line icon] {{重点特征1标题 in accent color}} / {{1-3 line description}}
- Column 2: [thin line icon] {{重点特征2标题}} / {{1-3 line description}}
- Column 3: [thin line icon] {{重点特征3标题}} / {{1-3 line description}}
- Column 4: [thin line icon] {{重点特征4标题}} / {{1-3 line description}}

Bottom center (smallest text, gray):
{{一句高级克制有记忆点的科普总结}}

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Chinese headline: large, black/dark charcoal, stable serif or premium sans
- Tagline: gray, medium weight, wider letter-spacing
- Info titles: low-saturation accent colors (warm brown, cool blue, teal, orange)
- Body: clear modern Chinese font

QUALITY CONSTRAINTS:
- 2K-4K sharp, subject texturally convincing
- No deformation, no cartoony, no plastic feel
- No yellow aged paper, no traditional infographic grids
- No round-corner cards, no thick borders, no decorative shapes
- No logos, minimal extra text, subject must NOT be small

title: 雪豹科普海报 — Apple 风格
description: 苍何原版实测案例，雪豹 Apple 风科普海报。
content:
Generate a 9:16 Apple-style premium natural science poster featuring Snow Leopard (雪豹).

Title area (top-left): Large Chinese: 雪豹 / Tagline: 天山的幽灵，海拔的王者 / English: Snow Leopard (Panthera uncia) / Distribution: 主要分布：中亚高原，海拔3000-5500m

Hero subject: Ultra-HD Snow Leopard, magnified to occupy 60% of visual area. Subject crouching on snow-dusted rock in a natural display posture, direct gaze toward camera. Fur texture: thick smoke-gray coat with black rosette spots, pale underside — every individual hair strand visible, hyper-realistic. Background: pure white with very subtle cold light gradient, no mountain scenery. Natural cast shadow underneath.

Bottom 4-column info strip (thin gray dividers, no card backgrounds):
- 栖息高度: 海拔3000-5500m，冬季下移至2000m树线
- 利爪特征: 前掌宽如飞碟，雪地行走专用减压结构
- 超长尾巴: 尾长可达90cm，相当于体长，兼顾平衡与保暖
- 濒危状态: 全球现存约4000-6500只，IUCN易危物种

Bottom summary (small gray): 它踏雪无痕，天山见证了它数千年的寂静统治。

Style: Apple product launch poster, pure white background, premium editorial, 2K quality, no cards no borders no old paper texture.

title: 深海章鱼科普海报 — 暗色系变奏
description: 深海生物特别版，深色背景变奏（注：大部分科普海报用白底，深海主题可用深色）。
content:
Generate a 9:16 premium science poster featuring the Mimic Octopus (拟态章鱼, Thaumoctopus mimicus).

Title area (top-left on dark background): Chinese name: 拟态章鱼 / Tagline: 海洋最强演员，角色随换随有 / English: Mimic Octopus / Distribution: 主要分布：印度尼西亚苏拉威西岛周边浅海

Background: Very deep navy blue-black gradient (ocean depth atmosphere), NOT pure white for this aquatic species.

Hero: Ultra-HD Mimic Octopus displayed in mid-color-change state — half showing banded white-brown pattern (lionfish mimicry), half revealing vivid suckers. Tentacles artfully spread to fill 65% of frame. Against the dark background, skin texture (chromatophore cells) luminously detailed. Cast shadow subtle.

Bottom 4-column strip (thin light gray dividers on dark background, text in light colors):
- 拟态物种: 已记录可模仿超过15种生物，含狮子鱼/比目鱼/海蛇
- 变色原理: 色素细胞+虹彩细胞，0.2秒完成图案切换  
- 智能等级: 章鱼目前记录最高学习能力，可解复杂工具谜题
- 发现时间: 1998年首次科学记录，地球上最晚被发现的魅力物种之一

Bottom summary (small, gray): 它没有骨骼，却演遍了所有有骨气的捕食者。

Quality: 4K, premium, magazine-grade, no watermarks, no cartoony feel.

title: 金刚鹦鹉科普海报 — 简洁自然版
description: 标准白底自然科普，金刚鹦鹉，色彩鲜艳的主体与极简背景形成张力。
content:
Premium natural science poster (9:16) for Scarlet Macaw (深红金刚鹦鹉, Ara macao).

Title area: 深红金刚鹦鹉 / Tagline: 亚马逊最高调的外交官 / Scarlet Macaw (Ara macao) / 分布：中美洲至南美洲热带雨林

Hero subject: Massive Scarlet Macaw perched in authoritative pose, occupying 55% of vertical visual area. Plumage detail: scarlet-red body, vivid yellow-green wing gradients, cobalt blue flight feathers — each feather individually detailed with barbule texture. Bold hooked beak, pale facial patch with fine red feather lines. Background: pure white, soft-box style lighting from above, realistic shadow beneath perch.

Bottom 4-column info (thin gray dividers):
- 体型参数: 体长85-96cm，翼展100cm，寿命野外30-40年，笼养可达75年
- 社交行为: 终身配偶制，每日互相理羽，失偶后可长期抑郁
- 飞行能力: 时速56km，单日迁飞可达数十公里寻盐矿
- 保育现状: CITES附录I国际贸易受控，栖息地丧失是主要威胁

Summary: 它用整片虹彩告诉雨林：美丽，本身就是一种生存策略。

Style: Apple science editorial, pure white, premium product photography aesthetic for the subject, 4K, no decorative elements.
